feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Deployment Error In SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hey all,

We have been working in SAP Build Process Automation for past few Days. 
Suddenly today we are facing deployment issue while deploying the workflow and I also tried to Redeploying the workflow which were working fine and still facing same error in deployment stating this.

Deployment request timeout
Correlation ID: 1516c989-9203-4006-95c6-95abc7697ec6

Attaching the Screenshot
 

 

I have also tried using different BTP Accounts but still facing same error .
Could anyone Suggest what are we doing wrong or may be it's an problem from SAP.

Many Thanks in Advance.
SAP Workflow Management, process visibility capability 
SAP Build Process Automation 

SAP BTP, ABAP environment 

SAP Workflow Management

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation- Right way to process a JSON array
entry.content:
I have a payload where I am getting of list of regions with a list of approvers for each region. For example - 

regions": [  "region": "USA","regionapprovers": [ { "approver": "djohnson@xyz.io" }, { "approver": "adavis@xyz.io" } ]]

Now I would like to process the above JSON Array into BPA and send an approval email for each region to get approval from at least one approver. 

What is the right way to implement this?

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: SAP build Process Automation is not capturing SAP GUI window completely
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to capture SAP GUI screen through build process automation, but it is not loading complete screen.

Please suggest how we can capture screen completely.

entry.title: SAP Desktop agent control tower is not working.
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

 

I am unable to do registration of new Agent. The screen is stucked after clicking 'Agents'. Please see the attached screenshots. Please suggest what to do to fix this.

entry.title: Process Automation Desktop Agent for MAC
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I'm trying to activate the tenant in my Desktop Agent for MAC but I'm facing an error when i login in to activate my tenant:

{
  "error": {
    "status": 403,
    "code": "SAP_IPA_05120",
    "severity": "error",
    "message": "Fail to create a registration token",
    "correlationId": "ce22161e-1183-404c-7b40-327453839ac7"
  }
}

I found the KBA Note 3401479, that fix this error, but it is only for windows. 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3401479/E

Some of you guys already had this same problems and can help me, please?
 SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation

entry.title: Error while creating a decisions in Build Process Automation - Again?
entry.content:
I'm trying to add a decision object to a SAP Build Process Automation project. After creating and configuring the decision I close the decision configuration screen and can see that the decision object found in the overview of objects in the project is stored with a almost transparent font.

 The decision object disappears (automatically deleted) in the overview of objects on the project.

I have raised similar question previously (Solved: Error while creating a decision - SAP Community) and the issue was solved. But it seems like the issue with decision creations in Build Process Automation occurs again. 

Has anyone done the same observations?

entry.title: Send files along with SAP Build Process Automation API Trigger
entry.content:
Hi All,

I just want to know is there a way to send PDF/Excel files along with the SAP Build Process Automation API Trigger ? So that I can extract the information from that file and do rest of the processing. Please point out to some blogs or documentations

Thank You

entry.title: 2nd Problem calling on Excel Data with Process Automation
entry.content: Something seems to have changed, and I can no longer link excel worksheets to my automation. The screenshot "current member fail.jpg" should allow me to select a value that looks like that in "value should be.jpg".

entry.title: Stuck in userlane tutorial. Can I skip the step?
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to get into SAP Build for some projects in my team. I am currently stuck on a basic tutorial for invoice approval. I followed the userlane guide until there was one step where I was not able to execute what was required. Think this is an error in the tutorial, but now I am stuck there and can't skip. Anyone had the same problem or ideas on how to continue?
(Concretely the error is in: Chapter 1 - SAP Build Process Automation with Vertical Process Editor; Lesson 2 - Build Automation to Extract Invoice Details; Step 1: Click the "Cog" icon <-- I clicked the Cog I con but the next step does not show)

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Unable to register Microsoft 365 external authentication
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have a requirement to read an excel sheet hosted on sharepoint and so I have configured an external authentication profile in SAP Build process automation portal. I have also completed its pre-requisite of creating Microsoft entra ID (Azure AD) application using Configure Azure Application | SAP Help Portal which generated clientID and client secret where in I have applied all the necessary permissions. The same along with tenant ID was used while configuring the external authentication profile.

I have an IRPA agent installed in my local machine and it is able to display the same profile. I entered my email address associated with Microsoft 365 and hit the register button, it opened a new page where in I logged in successfully. Post login, it redirected me to a page having URL https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/nativeclient?code=xxyzz becuase the same URL was specified in the Configure Azure application link above, this URL displays a blank page and nothing happens afterwards.

I believe instead of https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/nativeclient, it should redirect to some build process automation page where it should receive the ?code=xxyyzz to complete the authentication cycle.

Has anyone faced this issue? Need help

entry.title: how can i trigger workflow in SAP build process Automation from sapui5 Simple Form
entry.content:
Project Explaination :

I have created simple ui form with following fields

 1.customerName
 2.orderNumber
 3.orderAmount
 4.orderDate
 5.shippingCountry
 6.expectedDeliveryDate
As well as created submit button on submission submit button will have to trigger SBPA workflow.
 
Issue:
After submitting I am getting 503 error(service unavailable) for the reference I attached controller.js, xs-app.json and output  screenshot. I tried using postman it works fine but not able to trigger workflow by using sapui5 form. Even I checked destination all fields are correct.
 
What should I make changes for solving this issue?

xs-app.json

xs-app.json
controller

 

 

 

 

 

controller.js

controller

controller.js

Output screenoutput

entry.title: Re: SAP build Process Automation is not capturing SAP GUI...
entry.content:
I am also trying to capture the below SAP GUI screen.

  

After screen capture it is not showing full parts of the screen. Because of it not able to access User Input field and Password Input field.

Please suggest how to resolve this issue.

Thanks,

Siddhant

entry.title: Build Process Automation and Work Zone Connection different subaccounts?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we have been using SAP Build Process Automation  for a year to automate our processes. In the future we want to use the workflow capability of BPA. That's the reason why we want to connect Build Process Automation with Build Work Zone, standard edition. Is it necessary that both applications are located in the same subaccount in the BTP or can they have different subaccounts?

Kind regards,

Theresa

entry.title: Maximum number of concurrent unattended execution reached : Error in SAP BPA
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have SAP Build Process automation with Free Tier. I have created a basic job for extracting details from PDF and returning the raw information. When I run/ test the automation separately I can see the results. But when I deploy it and trigger the Process I am getting "Maximum number of concurrent unattended execution reached" error in the Monitoring tab.

I have attached images for reference

Tagging experts

@Archana 
@Chaitanya_Priya

entry.title: Build Process Automation subscription is failing again!
entry.content:
Hi,

It seems the problem with subscription to Build Process Automation is back.  I am getting it today. 

I checked the role collections assigned to my trial account user and none of them are appearing in my assigned roles.

I am following 

 Subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation | SAP Tutorials

Best Regards

entry.title: Dynamic parallel processing in SAP Build Process
entry.content:
Hi,

We have an existing custom classic workflow for purchase order where the approval is based on multiple cost centers of line items. It uses dynamic parallel processing using multiline element and a subworkflow.

We want the same feature implemented using SAP Build Process. Would appreciate if any guidance or blog post is available.

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Unable to Activate Event Mesh Webhook Subscription
entry.content:
Good day SAP community,

I created a webhook on the 4th of June, last week Tuesday, however the status remains inactive with subscription Paused. I attempted refresh, clicked resume, however, it has been on Paused.

Has anyone experienced this before and solved this? Any solution to this because I recreated the webhook and still having same issue.
I look forward to all suggestions. Thank you

entry.title: How to keep desktop agent session alive with unattended mode in RDP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

How to keep desktop agent session alive always with unattended mode in RDP, after few hours if desktop agent is not in use it is getting disconnected in the RDP.

Could you please help me how I can keep the desktop Agent session alive always with unattended mode.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: How to keep desktop agent session alive with unattended mode in RDP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

How to keep desktop agent session alive always with unattended mode in RDP, after few hours if desktop agent is not in use it is getting disconnected in the RDP.

Could you please help me how I can keep the desktop Agent session alive always with unattended mode.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: Download Desktop Agent 3 hanging
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using a trial account in US10 region.  The first step of the exercise for downloading agent 3 just hangs. 

I have already assigned three roles ProcessAutomationDeveloper, ProcessAutomationAdmin and ProcessAutomationParticipant to my user.  The following screen print is showing what I am facing (the tree circles)  

Best Regards
